determinism_policy: No wall-clock timestamp is used; identical source-pack inputs produce identical export manifests.

annual_completeness_audit.csv.role: June-year annual actual completeness audit and chart-treatment contract.

canonical_revenue_long.csv.role: Canonical long schema across actuals and model paths.

hybrid_annual_revenue.csv.role: Replacement-only annual NLTF hybrid roll-up audit using source-backed PED/FED, Light RUC and Heavy RUC bridge inputs plus MOT fixed components.

path_trace_status.csv.role: Availability and plotting status for required Revenue Outlook total-path traces.

reconciliation_report.csv.role: Hierarchy roll-up reconciliation and explicit gap report.

remaining_decisions_handoff.csv.role: Unresolved revenue decisions linked to runtime gaps and dashboard treatment.

series_role_audit.csv.role: Explicit role contract for modeled activity, revenue bridges, pass-through lines, deductions, overlays, and source gaps.

source_gap_register.csv.role: Structured source-pack gaps for release values, FED path scenarios, Crown top-up, quarterly rows, and bridge replay.

source_pack_intake_status.csv.role: Repo-local source-pack intake status, hashes, and replay gaps.

validation_issues.csv.role: Loader validation warnings/errors for the source pack.
